PLAINTIFF DOLORES DE LORENZO'S MOTION TO AMEND COMPLAINT IS CONTINUED TO JANUARY 13, 2014 TO GIVE THE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Complaint (Identification Of Doe Def)
Off Calendar Jan-13-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: ETHAN WIMERT, ESQ., 510.893.2700, FOR PLAINTIFF DOLORES DE LORENZO; No other appearances.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF DOLORES DE LORENZO'S MOTION To Amend Complaint (Identification Of Doe Def) IS Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed in open court. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Reporter: Tony Vaughn, CSR #6185

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Amend Complaint (Identification Of Doe Def)
Off Calendar Jan-03-2014 Continued To Jan-13-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF DOLORES DE LORENZO's Motion To Amend Complaint is continued to January 13, 2014 to give the moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than January 3, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =302/MJM
